programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.6m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Two-and-a-half meters and offshore? Might get a ride or two before the crowd shows up, and I get snaked by some kook.
🌊 Swell: 2.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 33.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.desc:
